misc: Rarely uses his driver, which has raised questions about his masculinity.
biography: From the serene settings of Kullo Golf Club, Ossi prepares for his fourth foray into the esteemed Hector Trophée. His consistent participation across three prior editions highlights an enduring commitment to this unique pairs competition, establishing him as a familiar presence on its demanding fairways.

Ossi's game is notably characterized by a distinctive strategic preference: a measured approach that frequently sees him forgo the driver in favor of accuracy and control. This tactical choice, while often effective, has on occasion sparked good-natured commentary among fellow competitors, playfully questioning the extent of his aggressive play. Despite his deliberate and precise style, both the coveted Hector Trophée for the winning pair and the individual Victor Trophy have yet to be secured by him.

As he embarks on his fourth appearance at the Hector Trophée 2026, Ossi remains a dedicated competitor, unswayed by past outcomes. His unwavering pursuit of excellence, expressed through his unique course management, ensures he will continue to be a player to observe, consistently bringing a thoughtful and determined game to the pursuit of championship glory.
